title: Loud Cloud - Cursed Fate Addon.
description: This mod adds Oboro Shirakumo (Loud Cloud) from MHA to Cursed Fate!
body:
# Oboro Shirakumo's Cloud Quirk

**Ability 1: Cloud Cover**
Shoot a cloud forward that will cover your targets face. They will be slowed down and will not be able to see for a short period of time
While holding the Quaterstaff this will condense it down shooting a damaging projectile!
_Flow:_ This will increase the time/damage of this move

**Ability 2: Sky-High**
Create a cloud under you that you can fly on, it will move slowly at first but when holding space you will be sent forward. This will constantly drain your Cursed Energy but will allow you to move very fast!
_Flow:_ Your speed will be increased but also your CE drain.

**Ability 3: Cloud-9**
If you are on your cloud, activate this ability and if you are hit you will be sent straight up into the air. This will blind all targets nearby when it goes off.
_Flow:_ You will be sent higher into the sky.
_Chant:_ The AOE will not deal damage to nearby targets.

**Ability 4: Mist of Clouds**
Create 5 clouds around you and coat yourself in one yourself, this will greatly increase the damage of your quaterstaff and if anyone hits the wrong cloud it will explode into a puff of smoke blinding them.

**Ability 5: Supporting Cloud** (W.I.P Normal Variant only works on players.)
Create a cloud under your target's feet which will move them around.
_Chant:_ Instead shoot out a cloud that will coat your target, slowing them down greatly but also protecting them.

**Ability 6: PLUS ULTRA**
Using two focus points you will go into a state of confidence and strength, you will run faster, jump higher, and deal more damage with your melees. 

## This mod also adds 1 item.
Quaterstaff: Crafted with 3 mangrove planks, this will change your moveset and also your moveset will buff this. It has the strength of a stone sword and cannot be enchanted.

Discord: https://discord.gg/y2vAFChfjn

Ko-Fi https://ko-fi.com/marcelinesorigins (Allow you to support me/Suggest CT to be made!)
